title: Ubiquiti NSM2, NanoStation M2
description: Ubiquiti NanoStation M2 is a powerful completely outdoor unit including 2x 11dBi (2x2 MIMO) antennas for the 2.4GHz band as a CPE solution suitable for shorter distances. The unit allows transmission speed up to 300Mbps . Compared to its predecessor has a stronger processor clocked at 400MHz and bigger memory. Dual Ethernet Connectivity With software-enabled PoE output , the secondary Ethernet port can power an external device, such as a PoE security camera, for seamless IP video integration.… Device PoE power adapter Power cord (2) mounting ties
